flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Laney College fell 64% between 2009 and 2010 (26.9% → 9.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Laney College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($564 → $766).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Laney College fell 33% between 2007 and 2010 (23.6% → 15.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Laney College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.9k).
